title: Unofficial Third Life Functionality
description: Adds a life system like Grian's Third Life server.
body:
# Third Life Functionality

This datapack is meant to emulate the experience of Grian's Third Life server, so you too can betray your friends with a good excuse. the best part? Completely vanilla! Just drop it into your server's datapack folder and have fun.

You start on green and every time you die your name changes to the next color and once you die 3 times you are out.
